title: ChatGPT Desktop Gets Real Human Tone: GPT-Live Voice Is Now Available, It Works Behind the Scenes as You Speak
excerpt: OpenAI has made a major upgrade to the ChatGPT desktop app today—the client, which has already merged with Codex, now officially introduces the ChatGPT Voice mo
content_html:
OpenAI has made a major upgrade to the ChatGPT desktop app today—the client, which has already merged with Codex, now officially introduces the ChatGPT Voice mode powered by the GPT-Live model. In the new version, users can directly start, check, or adjust tasks using voice in three sections: Chat, Work, and Codex, moving multi-threaded collaboration from typing on a keyboard to speaking.

This feature has a long history. OpenAI first added speech recognition to ChatGPT in 2024, then aggressively developed speech technology until the release of the latest GPT-Live model, which finally achieved full-duplex capabilities—it can listen and speak at the same time, making the experience of AI conversation more like real human interaction. In their statement, OpenAI clearly outlined their vision: in the future, users will only need to speak their needs, and ChatGPT will quickly advance multiple tasks according to your thoughts.

The most important feature of the new voice mode is that it allows users to start multiple workflows from a single conversation, while the intelligent agent silently completes the tasks in the background, enabling you to continue chatting with it. OpenAI gave an example of planning a business trip: you can ask ChatGPT to check your calendar for conflicts, scan your inbox for flight changes, and prepare meeting notes—everything happens while you are making coffee or doing something else. Compared to simply using voice as an input box, this "you speak, it handles the task, and both proceed without hindrance" interaction is exactly what GPT-Live aims to differentiate itself with.

sentences.zh: 这个功能有着悠久的历史。

sentences.zh: OpenAI于2024年首先在ChatGPT中加入了语音识别功能，随后积极开发语音技术，直到发布最新的GPT-Live模型，最终实现了全双工能力——可以同时听和说，让AI对话的体验更像真实的人类交互。

sentences.en: The most important feature of the new voice mode is that it allows users to start multiple workflows from a single conversation, while the intelligent agent silently completes the tasks in the background, enabling you to continue chatting with it.
sentences.zh: 新语音模式最重要的特点是，它允许用户从一次对话中启动多个工作流程，而智能代理则在后台默默地完成任务，使您能够继续与它聊天。

sentences.en: OpenAI gave an example of planning a business trip: you can ask ChatGPT to check your calendar for conflicts, scan your inbox for flight changes, and prepare meeting notes—everything happens while you are making coffee or doing something else.
sentences.zh: OpenAI 举了一个计划商务旅行的例子：你可以要求 ChatGPT 检查你的日历是否有冲突，扫描你的收件箱以了解航班变更，并准备会议记录 - 一切都在你煮咖啡或做其他事情时发生。

sentences.en: Compared to simply using voice as an input box, this "you speak, it handles the task, and both proceed without hindrance" interaction is exactly what GPT-Live aims to differentiate itself with.
sentences.zh: 与简单地使用语音作为输入框相比，这种“你说话，它处理任务，双方无障碍”的交互正是 GPT-Live 的差异化优势。

content_html_zh:
OpenAI 今天对 ChatGPT 桌面应用程序进行了重大升级——客户端已经与 Codex 合并，现在正式引入了由 GPT-Live 模型支持的 ChatGPT 语音模式。 在新版本中，用户可以在聊天、工作和Codex三个部分中使用语音直接启动、检查或调整任务，将多线程协作从键盘打字转变为语音。

这个功能有着悠久的历史。 OpenAI于2024年首先在ChatGPT中加入了语音识别功能，随后积极开发语音技术，直到发布最新的GPT-Live模型，最终实现了全双工能力——可以同时听和说，让AI对话的体验更像真实的人类交互。 OpenAI在声明中明确勾勒出他们的愿景：未来，用户只需要说出自己的需求，ChatGPT就会根据你的想法快速推进多项任务。

新语音模式最重要的特点是，它允许用户从一次对话中启动多个工作流程，而智能代理则在后台默默地完成任务，使您能够继续与它聊天。 OpenAI 举了一个计划商务旅行的例子：你可以要求 ChatGPT 检查你的日历是否有冲突，扫描你的收件箱以了解航班变更，并准备会议记录 - 一切都在你煮咖啡或做其他事情时发生。 与简单地使用语音作为输入框相比，这种“你说话，它处理任务，双方无障碍”的交互正是 GPT-Live 的差异化优势。
